goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range and should serve 'bistro' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'gastropub' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '6 people' at '14:45' on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 0'.
The hotel should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet', 'phone number', and 'hotel type'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range and should serve bistro food
The restaurant should be in the centre
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves gastropub food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 14:45 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 0
The hotel should be in the same area as the restaurant
Make sure you get whether they have internet, phone number, and hotel type
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
